title: Glulam
description: Glulam: Structural timber material of type Glued Laminated Timber to be used on structural elements and properties, or as a fragment of the physical material.

Name.description: A unique name is required for some structural packages to create and identify the object.

Density.description: Mean Density. Used to calculate mass. Called ρg,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DensityCharacteristic.description: Characteristic Density. Used to calculate other mechanical properties (not mass). Called ρg,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Density measured in [kg/m³].

DampingRatio.description: Dynamic Damping Ratio. Ratio between actual damping and critical damping. Property has a quantity of type Ratio measured in [-].

E_0_Mean.description: Mean modulus of elasticity parallel bending, E0,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

E_0_k.description: 5 percentile modulus of elasticity parallel bending, E0,05 in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

E_90_Mean.description: Mean modulus of elasticity perpendicular, E90,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

E_90_k.description: Mean modulus of elasticity perpendicular, E90,05 in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type YoungsModulus measured in [Pa].

G_Mean.description: Mean shear modulus parallel to the grain, Gg,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa].

G_k.description: Characteristic shear modulus parallel to the grain, Gg,05 in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa].

Gr_Mean.description: Mean shear modulus parallel to the grain, Gr,mean in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa].

Gr_k.description: Characteristic shear modulus parallel to the grain, Gr,05 in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type ShearModulus measured in [Pa].

BendingStrength.description: Characteristic Bending Strength. Normal stress parallel to the grain at failure in bending as calculated from beam equations. Called fm,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TensileStrengthParallel.description: Characteristic Tensile parallel Strength. Tensile stress parallel to the grain at failure in net tension. Called ft,0,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

TensileStrengthPerpendicular.description: Characteristic Tensile perpendicular Strength. Tensile stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net tension. Called ft,90,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CompressiveStrengthParallel.description: Characteristic Compressive parallel Strength. Compressive stress parallel to the grain at failure in net compression. Called fc,0,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

CompressiveStrengthPerpendicular.description: Characteristic Compressive perpendicular Strength. Compressive stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net compression. Called fc,90,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

ShearStrength.description: Characteristic Shear Strength. Shear stress parallel to the grain at failure in net shear, i.e. shear relevant to beam bending. Called fv,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

RollingShearStrength.description: Characteristic Rolling Shear Strength. Shear stress perpendicular to the grain at failure in net shear. Called fr,k in Eurocode. Property has a quantity of type Stress measured in [Pa].

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
